---
title: "get_series"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_series()`

Get Single Series

## Usage

```r
get_series(
  series_ticker,
  include_volume = FALSE,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `series_ticker` | Character. The series ticker (e.g., "KXHIGHNY"). |
| `include_volume` | Logical. Include volume data if TRUE. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A list with complete series details.

## Description

Retrieves detailed information for a specific series by ticker.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
series <- get_series("KXHIGHNY")
series$title
series$frequency

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other series: 
`get_series_list()`
